rulings.Case Title: FERNANDO ARTIGA VS. HAWK LING LOU ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Hawk Lou, Hawk Lou, Ketty Lou'S Joinder Of Defendants Hawk Ling Lou, Individually And Hawk Ling Lou And Ketty Fong Lou As Trustees Of The Hawk Ling Lou And Ketty Fong Lou Revocable Trust Dated January 27, 1998 In Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs First Amended Complaint Filed By Defendant Tom Jue And Company

rulings.Case Title: VICTORIA GALES VS. STEPHANE GENIEX ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Compelling Further Responses To Deft'S Production Of Docs Set 1 Nos: 1-9; Pos
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 10, 2017, Line 5. DEFENDANT STEPHANE GENEIX'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Defendant's Production Of Docs Set 1 Nos: 1-9. DENIED without prejudice for lack of evidence of meaningful meet and confer efforts by the moving party. While the purported meet and confer letters attached to counsel's declarations reference additional documents/pages which purportedly included an explanation why defendant believes that further responses were warranted, no such documents/pages were attached to exhibits on file. =(501/AYC)

rulings.Case Title: DUKE PARTNERS II, LLC VS. KEYHAN MOHANNA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 10, 2017, Line 6. DEFENDANT KEYHAN MOHANNA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges facts to state a claim for unlawful detainer against alleged former owner of the premises. Complaint is not uncertain. Veracity of the allegations cannot be properly tested by a demurrer. =(501/AYC)

rulings.Case Title: JUDITH MATTON VS. KENNETH PACADA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 10, 2017, Line 14. DEFENDANT KENNETH PACADA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. While allegations in the First Amended Complaint are not a modicum of clarity, taken together allegations in paragraphs 8 and 9 sufficiently state that service of the Notice by both posting and mailing was accomplished on August 2, 2017. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied. =(501/AYC)

rulings.Case Title: CITIBROKERS, INC VS. HUNTER JAMESON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion, Motion, Memo Of Points And Authorities And Declaration In Support Of Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment; Proposed Response; And Proposed Order
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 10, 2017, Line 9. DEFENDANT HUNTER JAMESON'S Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment. Hearing Required. Defendant shall be ready to immediately post $3,090.50 with the Court or present evidence of accepted rent for June to October 2017 (for example, receipts issued by the landlord, cancelled checks). Defendant should also present any evidence regarding his vision.

rulings.Case Title: EMELIA H. ROMERO VS. JOSEPH ROMERO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate And Set Aside Entry Of Default And Default Judgment And Reinstate Action For Mistake, Surprise, Inadvertence And Excusable Neglect And Based On Attorney Affidavit Of Fault (Ccp 473(B))
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 10, 2017, Line 10. DEFENDANTS JOSEPH ROMERO, MARINA ROMERO'S Motion To Vacate And Set Aside Entry Of Default And Default Judgment And Reinstate Action For Mistake, Surprise, Inadvertence And Excusable Neglect And Based On Attorney Affidavit Of Fault (Ccp 473(B)). GRANTED, subject to opposition and Defendant filing and serving answer no later than October 10, 2017 by 4:00 p.m. Defendant meets the requirements for discretionary relief under CCP 473(b). =(501/AYC)
